review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9 2: Hiring Process : Which is very horrible, Not smooth at all. The ultimate swag of HR, you will notice in this process. Normally Its takes 2-3 months or more than that to get your offer letter. That time you feel that you are going to compete with google employees Salary : If you are negotiating then you are losing your chances to work in adani or If not they will hire you with the lowest salary that would be much less than supervisor There is no salary bar according to your Job position. Might be there is a possibility that the labour/operator/checker/lasher would have more salary than the managerial position person. Note : You won’t get salary hike easily (Salary on time at the end of month) (Complex Compensation proposal format which is not easy to understand for freshers / 2 yrs exp. person) Location: Mundra, One of the most backward area (For them If you are from Metro cities). Because the worst food you will get inside the port area and in hostel). Better to get a personal bike/ car otherwise difficult to get transportation if you want to anywhere and will be rely on Adani bus/there cabs. Accommodation: 2 persons living inside the small room and if both of them working in 12 hours shift then shifts will get clash, At least need some rest to get back on work for the next day. (You can cook at room but again for 12 hours of shift person, You will not get enough time to do other things) Zomoto and swiggy is there but not for 24 hrs and it takes around 1 hours for the delivery ( Someday you will not even find one Restaurant) Adani Applications : For Each and every small thing there is a App. Glitches/Errors/ bugs that you will face some times. Transportation : Adani buses and their cabs are available which takes 1 hour to reach at your office/ Terminal, While returning there is no direct to your township Again Very Time consuming Most of Management people, Are from labour (Previously worked as a Operator) No words for them If you want to work without keeping anything in you mind and ready to give efforts with clear mind and ready to face any health issues, Not caring about about standard of living/food/ personal time etc. GO FOR IT EXIT Process : Not smooth at all Advice : First provide proper resources then ask questions
